Maharana Jawan Singh of Mewar (r. 1828–38) Holding a Falcon
by Ghasi
Northwestern India, Rajasthan, Rajput Kingdom of Mewar · c. 1835 · gum tempera, pearls, silk, and gold on paper
←Spanish or south German Giorgio Ghisi→
